Shop — Knitwear — Ribbed Crewneck

Knitwear

Ribbed Crewneck

$145.00

Extra-fine merino wool in a dense rib. Relaxed fit, reinforced seams. The foundation of every outfit.

Color

Black

Size

Premium natural fibers sourced from certified suppliers. Each material is selected for longevity and minimal environmental impact.

Dry clean or hand wash in cold water. Lay flat to dry. Store folded, away from direct light.

Free shipping on orders over $200. Returns accepted within 14 days of delivery. Items must be unworn and in original packaging.
